source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
身為怪胎之一，我們就是會經常在各處受到攻擊。不論是線上、線下，甚至是來自你最親近的人。那些攻擊通常源於恐同、恐跨，或者有時候只是單純不喜歡我們有多怪、行為有多奇特，特別是像進行角色扮演和獸祖/獸靈認同（therianthropy）這類更深層沉浸的獸迷。

因此，我們有些人透過不透露自己是誰、來自哪裡來獲得安全感。有些人則只向朋友或親近的朋友公開身份來確保安全。露臉或露身材是大多數獸迷至少會在私密貼文裡做過一次的事，不論是那種「待會刪」的貼文，還是在限時動態裡。

儘管如此，我們對於線下的社交互動還是很開放的。我們會辦獸聚（furmeets）——獸迷之間的私人聚會，不論是群體還是個人，在活動中還是隨性的聚聚——有時還會舉辦獸展/獸迷大會，像是 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在線下和大家見面、認識彼此、能見到本人真的很開心，因為我們大多數人從未見過對方的長相，還可以拍張照片私下保存並在公開時打碼、一起大笑、聊聊共同的興趣等等。這真的很好玩、很社交，而且很溫暖。

不過，現在的感覺已經不一樣了。隨著人們開始試圖剝奪他人的匿名性，攻擊獸迷、獸祖、LGBTQIA，並對他們進行肉搜，再加上我們社群內部也參與並挑起各種八卦紛爭，事情變得有點更加混亂、不那麼溫暖，也越來越沒有社群或大家庭的感覺了。已經不再和以前一樣了。

我有一部分的內心希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代的感覺，但是，我就順其自然吧。我對社會和人類有點失去信心了。我真的累了，看著事情變得越來越糟，而且旨在攻擊和分裂小社群，讓我們陷入絕望。我很不喜歡現在的社會不再懂得尊重和團結。
hypo_1:
身為怪胎的一份子，我們就是會經常在各處被針對。不管是在網路上、現實中，甚至連身邊最親近的人也會出手。那些攻擊通常是因為恐同、恐跨，或者有時候單純就是討厭我們這麼怪、行為這麼奇特，特別是像進行角色扮演和獸祖認同這類玩得更深、更沉浸的獸迷。

所以我們有些人會透過隱藏身份和來歷來保護自己。有些人則是只對朋友或摯友公開自己來求個安全。露臉或露身材算是大多數獸迷的某種文化了，至少都曾在私密貼文裡發過一次，不論是那種「待會刪」的廢文還是發在限時動態裡。

話雖如此，我們對線下的現實社交還是很敞開的。我們會辦獸聚——獸迷之間的私人聚會，不管是群聚還是私約、在活動裡還是隨性約約——有時還會辦獸迷大會，像是 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在現實中見面真的很棒，可以認識彼此，還能看到本尊，畢竟我們大多數人都沒看過對方的長相。大家可以一起拍照私下留念、發公開時打個馬賽克，然後一起大笑、聊聊共同的興趣之類的。真的很熱鬧、很好玩、很溫暖。

不過，現在的感覺已經不一樣了。隨著大家開始想剝奪別人的匿名性，攻擊並肉搜獸迷、獸祖和 LGBTQIA 族群，加上我們社群內部也跟著瞎起鬨、到處吃瓜攪和，事情變得越來越混亂，少了人情味，也越來越沒有那種社群或大家庭的凝聚感了。真的回不去了。

我內心有一部分希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代的那種感覺，但，就隨緣吧。我對這個社會和人類有點心灰意冷了。看著事情變得越來越糟，而且都是在針對和分裂小社群、把人逼入絕境，我真的累了。我很不喜歡現在的社會不再互相尊重、不再團結的樣子。

身為怪胎的一份子，我們就是會經常在各處被攻擊。不管是在網路上、現實中，甚至連身邊最親近的人也會出手。那些攻擊通常是因為恐同、恐跨，或者有時候單純就是討厭我們這麼怪、行為這麼奇特，特別是像進行角色扮演和獸祖認同這類玩得更深、更沉浸的獸迷。

所以我們有些人會透過隱藏身份和來歷來保護自己。有些人則是只對朋友或摯友公開自己來求個安全。露臉或露身材算是大多數獸迷的某種文化了，至少都曾在私密貼文裡發過一次，不論是那種「待會刪」的貼文還是發在限時動態裡。

話雖如此，我們對線下的現實社交還是很敞開的。我們會辦獸聚——獸迷之間的私人聚會，不管是群聚還是私約、在活動裡還是隨性約約——有時還會辦獸迷大會，像是 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在現實中見面真的很棒，可以認識彼此，還能看到本尊，畢竟我們大多數人都沒看過對方的長相。大家可以一起拍照私下留念、發公開時打個馬賽克，然後一起大笑、聊聊共同的興趣之類的。真的很熱鬧、很好玩、很溫暖。

不過，現在的感覺已經不一樣了。隨著大家開始想剝奪別人的匿名性，攻擊並肉搜獸迷、獸祖和 LGBTQIA 族群，加上我們社群內部也跟著瞎起鬨、到處吃瓜攪和，事情變得越來越混亂，少了人情味，也越來越沒有那種社群或大家庭的凝聚感了。真的回不去了。

我內心有一部分希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代的那種感覺，但，就隨緣吧。我對這個社會和人類有點心灰意冷了。看著事情變得越來越糟，而且都是在針對和分裂小社群、把人逼入絕境，我真的累了。我很不喜歡現在的社會不再互相尊重、不再團結的樣子。

Every time she comes in.
Otherwise, I'd let it go.
Takes all kinds.
Have a good one.

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
我剛看到 Kendall Coyne Schofield 在賽前熱身時穿著球衣……她今天會上場嗎？？？🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason 波士頓對明尼蘇達

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
不管 Heise 剛才在球場中央做了什麼，讓 Fleet 的球員一屁股跌坐在地上，那名 Fleet 的球員在 10 秒後狠狠地加倍奉還了。哎喲。😬🫣
一方面，我希望 Fleet 守門員的 PWHL 首秀能順利，但另一方面，我又希望 Frost 能贏。
在 Fleet 踢進第二球後，Kendall Coyne Schofield 在球網前拿著球桿一陣混亂地爭奪，她真的超不爽。很高興能看到她帶著怒火重返球場，她真的超猛！

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
看起來 Klees 換回了他原本的第一線，而 Kendall 他們急需要拿下一球，然後他們就真的他媽的進球了！太棒啦

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
耶！他們把比分追平了！
不不不不，Fleet 又領先了。
這場比賽根本像在坐雲霄飛車！

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
哇塞，Fleet *依然*在針對 Heise。哎呀。Heise 在中場那次沒被判罰的推人，換來了 Fleet 兩次的犯規判罰。

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
能看到 Kendall Coyne Schofield 重新守在球門區前，被比她高一整顆頭的女球員推來推去，卻還能立刻推回去並組織進攻，真的太棒了。

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
從我們看到的畫面來看，觀眾都不覺得 Curl 粗暴防守值得被判兩次小罰。
觀眾對 Fleet 因為 71 號受傷而被判非法衝撞這件事很不爽。
我覺得我們在剛才那次多打少優勢中，連一次有效射門都沒有。
波士頓的防守實在太強了，完全不給我們任何機會。

我覺得我們在剛才那次多打少優勢中，連一次有效射門都沒有。
波士頓的防守實在太強了，完全不給我們任何機會。
hypo_7:
我剛看到 Kendall Coyne Schofield 在賽前熱身時穿著球衣……她今天會上場嗎？？？🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason 波士頓對明尼蘇達

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
不管 Heise 剛才在球場中央做了什麼，讓 Fleet 的球員一屁股跌坐在地上，那名 Fleet 的球員在 10 秒後狠狠地加倍奉還了。哎喲。😬🫣
一方面，我希望 Fleet 守門員的 PWHL 首秀能順利，但另一方面，我又希望 Frost 能贏。
在 Fleet 踢進第二球後，Kendall Coyne Schofield 在球網前拿著球桿一陣混亂地爭奪，她真的超不爽。很高興能看到她帶著怒火重返球場，她真的超猛！

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
看起來 Klees 換回了他原本的第一線，而 Kendall 他們急需要拿下一球，然後他們就真的他媽的進球了！太棒啦

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
耶！他們把比分追平了！
不不不不，Fleet 又領先了。
這場比賽根本像在坐雲霄飛車！

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
哇塞，Fleet *依然*在針對 Heise。哎呀。Heise 在中場那次沒被判罰的推人，換來了 Fleet 兩次的犯規判罰。

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
能看到 Kendall Coyne Schofield 重新守在球門區前，被比她高一整顆頭的女球員推來推去，卻還能立刻推回去並組織進攻，真的太棒了。

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social 所以，我們現在標記真人創作的內容，只是為了讓他們有更少垃圾的數據集可以用來訓練嗎？
我不知道耶，他們應該被自己製造出來的那些吐滿地的垃圾給淹死，直到他們的潛在向量空間收斂到歸一為止。

@helpsterTee @hannorein 我第一個想到的也是這個。我把個人網站關了，因為我不想餵養各種「折磨節點」（Torment Nexuses）。標記真正的真人內容，只會讓他們更容易建立乾淨、沒有垃圾的新數據集。
我曾想過反其道而行，為 AI 爬蟲程式建一個「毒藥罐」，但我那可憐的小伺服器沒那麼厲害。

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social 對啊，要痛苦大家一起痛苦。
如果你的雇主硬要把 AI 塞進你的日常工作裡，先別急著辭職，用惡意合規的方式把它用在超級平凡無奇的問題上，大方接受那些似是而非的答案，同時狂燒公司的 Token 額度來搞垮每季的業績。
我真的對這一切感到厭煩了，反正他們不管怎樣都會用這東西來對付我們，那不如趁還能玩的時候找點樂子 🫤
補充：反正他們本來就一直在編造數據和假造利潤，會讓你雇主破產的那點用量，根本不會對垃圾總部的虧本詐騙事業或他們那台燒毀森林的垃圾永動機造成任何影響。

我不知道耶，他們應該被自己吐出來的那堆垃圾給噎死，直到他們的潛在向量空間收斂到歸一為止。

@helpsterTee @hannorein 我第一時間也是想到這個。我把我的個人網站關了，因為我不想餵養那些「折磨核心」。標記真正的真人內容，只會讓建置乾淨、無垃圾的新數據集變得更容易。
我曾想過反其道而行，為 AI 爬蟲建個「毒罐」，但我那可憐的小伺服器沒那麼夠力。

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social 對啊，要痛苦大家一起痛苦。
如果你的老闆硬要把 AI 塞進你的日常工作，先別急著辭職，用「惡意順從」的方式，把它用在完全微不足道的問題上，欣然接受那些似是而非的答案，順便狂燒公司的 token 額度來搞砸當季業績。
我真的對這一切感到超厭煩，反正他們橫豎都會用這東西來對付我們，那不如趁還能玩的時候找點樂子 🫤
補充：反正他們早就一直在瞎編數據和捏造利潤了，會讓你老闆破產的那點用量，根本不會對垃圾總部那套賠錢的詐騙事業或他們那台燒毀森林的垃圾永動機造成任何影響。

source_doc:
Do you what do you think of that?
Looking back on it, the rivalry and the late night wars and all that stuff.
And do you like.
Obviously, maybe you think it's a shame.
Maybe like, how do you how do you categorize it in your mind?
Well, it's, um, overall it's embarrassing.
Um, because I don't want to be the guy who's, uh, pissed off because, oh, I didn't get so-and-so because I didn't truly feel that way.
You didn't feel that way?
No, no.
Well, how did you feel?

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble 在信任與安全（T&S）方面做得爛透了
願意多聊聊這點，或是丟個連結給我嗎？
> 反正 Whitney (Bumble) 都已經是億萬富翁了，她哪會在乎？
我猜 Bumble 應該不是她一個人創立的，甚至可能根本不是最初團隊的一員（就像馬斯克和特斯拉那樣）。那其他人呢？
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> 我覺得還是有空間可以退回以前的模式
其實有很多新模式可以嘗試，絕對都比在數據工廠或去中心化社群網路上玩雜亂的標籤配對要好得太多了。我之前看過一個點子，是把線上交友做成一種以群組為基礎的社交體驗。這算是一個大方向正確的嘗試。就像這個討論串另一分支裡 @cy 提到關於媒人（matchmaker）的點子一樣。

(3/?)
說到輪盤，那來個 Chat Roulette 這種即時視訊交友風格的快速約會 App 怎麼樣？
這款 App 可以：
* 進行一些基本的信任與安全（T&S）審查（以減少未經同意的露鳥照等），包括確認你大概在哪個地區（想知道怎麼做就問我吧！）
* 讓你和同地區的人進行一輪即時的快速約會（文字？語音？視訊？見 4/4）。
* 就像一般的快速約會一樣，如果你們在聊完後都把對方加到「最愛」，就能拿到對方的聯絡方式。
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey 我之前差點就要加入 #Chatroulette 了，但後來新冠疫情和烏克蘭戰爭爆發，所以就沒下文了。不過我當時想帶領他們走向不同的方向。
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ？這個行業裡確實沒什麼交友網站的吹哨者，但業界的安全維護人員確實會跟我聊聊。我知道超多關於大多數交友網站內部運作的事情，多到我根本不想知道那麼多，遺憾的是，Bumble 跟其他家一樣爛，這其實也不算什麼驚人的大發現啦。
沒有一家交友網站在信任與安全（T&S）上花超過表面功夫的精力。他們會去權衡訴訟成本和實際做好防護的成本，而到目前為止，訴訟成本總是比較低。

@lorry
> 這個行業裡確實沒什麼交友網站的吹哨者
有什麼特別的原因嗎？
> 他們會去權衡訴訟成本和實際做好防護的成本，而到目前為止，訴訟成本總是比較低
哈。《鬥陣俱樂部》的法則還真管用。真悲哀。我們的數位配對工具應該要給我們更好的服務才對。

說到碰運氣，那來個 Chat Roulette 這種即時視訊交友風格的快速約會 App 怎麼樣？
這款 App 可以：
* 進行一些基本的信任與安全（T&S）審查（以減少收到不請自來的露鳥照之類的），包括確認你大概在哪個地區（想知道怎麼做就問我吧！）
* 讓你和同地區的人進行一輪即時的快速約會（文字？語音？視訊？詳見 4/4）。
* 就像一般的快速約會一樣，如果你們在聊完後都把對方加到「最愛」，就能拿到對方的聯絡方式。

其實有很多新模式可以嘗試，絕對都比在「數據工廠」或去中心化社群網路上玩主題標籤大風吹要好得太多。我之前看過一個點子，是把線上交友做成一種以群組為基礎的社交體驗。這算是指對了方向。就像這個討論串另一分支裡 @cy 提到關於線上媒人的點子一樣。

(3/?)
說到大風吹，那來個 Chat Roulette 風格的快速約會 App 怎麼樣？
這款 App 可以：
* 進行一些基本的 T&S（信任與安全）審查（以減少收到沒禮貌的露鳥照之類的），包括確認你大概在哪個地區（想知道怎麼做就問我吧！）
* 讓你和同地區的人來一輪即時的快速約會（文字？語音？視訊？詳見 4/4）。
* 就像一般的快速約會一樣，如果你們在聊完後都把對方加到「最愛」，就能拿到對方的聯絡方式。
#線上交友 #ChatRoulette

@strypey 我之前差點就要加入 #Chatroulette 了，但後來新冠疫情和烏克蘭戰爭爆發，所以就沒下文了。不過我當時想帶領他們走向不同的方向。
#Bumble #信任與安全 ？這個行業裡確實沒什麼交友網站的吹哨者，但業界的安全維護人員確實會跟我聊聊。我知道超多關於大多數交友網站內部運作的事情，多到我根本不想知道。遺憾的是，Bumble 跟其他家一樣爛，這其實也不算什麼驚人的大發現啦。
沒有一家交友網站在 T&S 上花超過表面功夫的精力。他們會去權衡訴訟成本和實際做好防護的成本，而到目前為止，訴訟成本總是比較低。

@lorry
> 這個行業裡確實沒什麼交友網站的吹哨者
有什麼特別的原因嗎？
> 他們會去權衡訴訟成本和實際做好防護的成本，而到目前為止，訴訟成本總是比較低
哈。《搏擊俱樂部》的法則還真管用。真悲哀。我們的數位配對工具應該要給我們更好的服務才對。

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
我另一半跟 Ikea 約了視訊諮詢，想拿訂製廚房的報價。這真的讓人大開眼界，看清了那些針對戰後嬰兒潮世代設計的線上服務生態系統到底有多奇葩。
1. 他們三週前寄了視訊諮詢的連結，用的是 Ikea 專屬的視訊會議系統。
2. 他們要求提供新廚房的設計圖和 3D 渲染圖。
3. 他們寄了一封 Email 說「感謝您傳送設計圖」。
4. 我們今天撥進去，他們一開頭就說「我們的系統阻擋了您的檔案，我們一起來重新設計您的廚房吧」。
1/x

5. 我另一半問有沒有其他方法可以分享設計圖（那些圖超詳細，花我們整整一個星期的時間才畫好），但 Ikea 的客服機器人只會照本宣科，根本不想聽。
6. 腳本的下一步是「在電話中跟客戶一筆一畫痛苦地從零開始設計，在鍵盤上一個鍵一個鍵慢慢敲，而且他們設計軟體的介面用得超不順手」。
2/x

7. 他們沒辦法分享螢幕，所以整個過程就像一場小丑秀，一直在雞同鴨講，搞不清楚現在到底在講哪張圖的哪個部分。

8. 時間已經超過了原本預計的諮詢總時數，但他們才剛確認好 35% 的尺寸。

9. 到目前為止，整整 8 分鐘都是客服機器人手忙腳亂地在輸入我們提供的尺寸。

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

hypo_0:
而且這部電影其實不差——有些場景視覺效果超震撼——但它完全就是用其他更棒、主題更連貫的電影拼湊出來的。所以裡面看得到《2001太空漫遊》、《三體》、《異星入境》，還有一點點《瓦力》的影子，但它同時也是《俏皮帥哥拯救世界第17集》，說到底就只是沒那麼好看

觀影時我在想，為什麼地球非得面臨危機不可？而那兩位多元文化背景的船員死掉、留下白人男性掌權，算不算某種「反覺醒」的表態？但考慮到原著作者安迪·威爾身為「最懂媒體讀寫能力的自由意志主義者」，曾發表過「《星際爭霸戰》就該只是太空船發射雷射光咻咻咻」之類的言論，至少對他來說，後者的答案是肯定的，而前者的答案則是「法西斯主義」

@esvrld 我不久前讀了這本書，可能有點太高估他了，特別是考量到他最近大放厥詞的表現。但我把國際船員的死亡、留下白人男孩孤軍奮戰，理解為他意識到自己的第二本書會失敗，是因為他根本不擅長寫人際互動，他唯一的技能就是設計一些聰明的小謎題，讓他的自我投射角色在完全孤立的狀態下去解決。給他安排一個外星人夥伴是個妙招，因為這開啟了角色互動的可能性，卻又不需要去模仿人類之間相處的方式

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.

Once upon a time in a kingdom of great beauty.

We have seen 40 houses.
The market's just too fast.
Prices are realistic.
If only there was a fearless hero to save the day.
I could kiss you.

To make dreams come true.
Oh, angel.
But we live in the real world.
They'll just have to make do with us.
We're back.

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
吃了一點雞肉，也洗了個澡。上次餵她喝補水液的時候，她掙扎得比之前用力了一點點。
我們今天早上 8 點半打給獸醫，問他們昨天在她被麻醉的時候，有沒有檢查她的軟顎下方，因為她有很嚴重的耳息肉。對方說獸醫晚點會回電。結果根本沒打，剛才（當地時間 16 點 45 分）我們又打過去，卻被告知那位獸醫今天沒上班。我有點不爽，就說：「我們昨天付了你們 600 多英鎊，你們說有問題可以打來問，現在我們有問題，你們卻不回答！」
「先生，我不喜歡你的語氣。」
「這不是針對你個人，但當我付了快一千英鎊的時候，我預期會得到相對應的服務，而你們現在並沒有提供。」
「我會請另一家分院的獸醫回電給你。」

七點半要帶她去另一家診所看獸醫，拿更多止吐藥。因為我們一大早就打去了，所以他們不會收非門診時間的急診費。
剛剛又成功餵她喝了 10 毫升的急救補水液。

回來了。打了止吐針、開了加巴噴丁（gabapentin），她已經回家了。吃了一些雞肉和起司。
還幫她拿了更多藥錠型的加巴噴丁。

吃個不停。得讓她吃慢一點，免得她吐出來。她現在整隻貓完全、徹底、百分之百嗨爆了。醉醺醺的。神智不清。飄飄欲仙。整個人活在黃色潛水艇的世界裡。
獸醫說這會重新激發她的食慾，或者，當我們停用止痛藥時，要是她又不吃了，就代表是疼痛讓她沒胃口，那就得去做醫學影像檢查了。

她吃了一點點，甚至還玩了一下下，但她還在服藥期間，所以可能只是藥效的關係。還是有持續餵她喝復原補水液，她依然沒有像平常那樣抗拒。

Valencia 覺得我們大家都很可疑。叫她不來，走過去她就跑。不過她想撒嬌時還是會自己過來，所以還好，她只是看到她的領養姊姊一直被毛巾包起來強迫灌東西，她可不想也落得那種下場，謝謝喔。

Ming 的最新近況：她活動力好了一點點，但還是軟綿綿的，而且睡很久。她還在吃兩種止痛藥，所以可能還是滿嗨的。
她確實有在吃東西，少量多餐，而且還自己把碟子裡最後一點點急救補水液舔光了。她有在洗臉，但好久沒有出手打 Valencia 了，她還是不太對勁。希望只是止痛藥的關係，等我們停藥後，她的食慾還能維持住。

Ming 已經把這療程的止痛藥吃完了，現在一直吵著想出去，但我們還不准她出去。她有吃也有玩，但還要過幾天等藥效完全從體內代謝掉，我們才能看出她的真實狀況。
審慎樂觀。

她吃了一點點，甚至還玩了一下下，但她還在吃藥，所以可能只是藥效的關係。還是有持續餵她喝復原電解水，她依然沒有像平常那樣抗拒。

Valencia 覺得我們大家都很可疑。叫她不來，走過去她就跑。不過她想撒嬌時還是會自己過來，所以還好，她只是看到她的領養姊姊一直被毛巾包起來強迫灌東灌西，她可不想也落得那種下場，謝謝喔。

Ming 的最新近況：她活動力好了一點點，但還是軟綿綿的，而且睡很久。她還在吃兩種止痛藥，所以可能還是滿嗨的。
她確實有在吃東西，少量多餐，而且還自己把小碟子裡最後一點點電解水點光了。她有在給自己整理毛髮，但好久沒有動手巴 Valencia 了，她還是不太對勁。希望只是止痛藥的關係，等我們停藥後，她的食慾還能維持住。

Ming 已經把這療程的止痛藥吃完了，現在一直吵著想出去，但我們還不准她出去。她有吃也有玩，但還要過幾天等藥效完全從體內代謝掉，我們才能看出她的真實狀況。
審慎樂觀。
hypo_5:
又吃了一點雞肉，也舔毛洗了個澡。上次強餵她喝水的時候，她掙扎得稍微有力了一點。
我們今天早上 8 點半打給獸醫，問他們昨天在她被鎮靜的時候，有沒有順便檢查她的軟顎下方，因為她耳道息肉很嚴重。對方說獸醫會再回電。結果根本沒打，剛剛（當地時間 16 點 45 分）我們又撥過去，居然被告知那位獸醫今天沒上班。我有點不爽，就說：「我們昨天付了你們 600 多英鎊，你們說有問題可以打來問，現在我們有問題，你們卻不回答！」
「先生，我不喜歡你的語氣。」
「這不是針對你個人，但當我付了快一千英鎊，我預期會得到相對應的服務，而你們現在並沒有提供。」
「我會請另一家分院的獸醫回電給你。」

七點半要帶她去另一家診所看獸醫，拿更多止吐藥。因為我們一大早就打去了，所以他們不會收非門診時間的急診費。
剛剛又成功餵了她 10 毫升的電解質補充液。

回來了。打了止吐針、吃了加巴噴丁，她已經平安到家。吃了一些雞肉和起司。
還幫她拿了更多藥錠型的加巴噴丁。

source_doc:
Oh, you want that car to disappear?
Huh?
No, no no no.
We just need the front right paneling thingy fixed.
Yeah.
A little fender bender.
Yeah, and we need it right away.
Sunny.
She knows my name.
No, no, no, I'm actually in my mid 40s.
I call everybody sunny.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
喔，你想讓那輛車消失嗎？
蛤？
不不不。
我們只需要把右前方的板金什麼的修好。
對。
一點小擦撞。
對，而且我們急著要。
小老弟。
她知道我的名字。
不不不，其實我已經四十多歲了。
我叫每個人都叫小老弟。

smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc

source_doc:
She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

請歡迎 Margot Robbie。

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

hypo_0:
我每週會和一位工程總監開一次 1 小時的會，跟他大聊特聊我對管理產品管理團隊的看法，沒想到這居然變成了一個很讚的系列單元

目前的討論主題有：
- 產品經理的不同類型，以及制定需求的基本技能
- 產品經理如何確保工程團隊能維持穩定的工作節奏
- 如何應對背景各異（像是工程、數據分析、營運領域專家、顧問等）的產品經理
最有趣的是，這位總監和我以前在同一家公司共事過，那時有一些我沒有直接帶領的產品經理，現在我就可以拿他們當例子，說：「嘿，你還記得那個人嗎？他超棒的，原因在於……」

所以現在在各種 Email 往來和 Slack 討論串裡，我看到什麼就會轉寄給這位總監（如果他不在裡面的話），然後跟他說：「好，一個『優秀』的產品經理會『這樣』做，而一個『糟糕』的產品經理會『那樣』做。還記得某某某以前做過『這個』嗎？那樣做就很讚。」

source_doc:
Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.
I'm sure the agency said you were 25.
You're not 25, are you?
You're nothing like 25.
Have you ever had a job as a governess before?
No.
But have you ever had any kind of a job?
Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

妳還太年輕，對孩子根本一無所知。
我記得仲介說妳 25 歲。
妳其實沒有 25 歲，對吧？
妳看起來一點也不像 25 歲。
妳以前當過家庭教師嗎？
沒有。
那妳以前做過任何工作嗎？
有的，我做過。
但妳說話難道就不能完整說完一句嗎？
可以，如果妳讓我說完的話。
好吧，我們重新開始。
坐吧。
跟我說說妳自己的事。

source_doc:
I don't think y'all understand how excited I am to eat these.
I had them for the very first time when I last came to Portugal, and I was obsessed.
I ate about 50 of these.
Probably no exaggeration.
I ate so many of these when I was when I was last here.
And then I tried them in like other countries afterwards.
And they never hit the same.
They never hit the same.
So I'm having these again in Portugal.
Let's try them.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. hypo_0:
一陣子沒動手，終於有進度了。我搬出縫紉機來車帽簷跟一片帽冠。縫好了一半的帽冠和帽簷，擺在用紙版型做好的紙模上。之前因為我是順著縫線別大頭針，而不是垂直別，結果車歪了，只好拆掉重車。如果想要帽簷再深一點的話，我可能會重新做一次。
#製帽 #手作帽

八片帽冠和兩片帽簷已經拼成三大塊，並用別針固定出大致的形狀。這次是用綠色天鵝絨做 Sachi's Studio 的報童帽版型。大部分是機器縫製。
版型說明有提到要在帽冠接縫處壓線，這表示可以用同色線或對比色的線。
#製帽 #手作帽

把左右兩半帽冠縫合前的頂部視角。正在複習教學影片。我發現 Sachi 在車縫時是用幾個小彈簧夾，而不是把整條縫線都別上大頭針。

報童帽頂端八片接合的地方有點亂，看來可能需要一個大一點的包釦來遮一下接縫了。

帽冠完全拼好了，頂端也加上了包釦。毛邊暫時塞在裡面。縫線還沒燙平也還沒壓線。
#製帽 #手作帽

休息一陣子之後終於有進度啦！我搬出縫紉機來車帽簷跟一條帽冠接縫。目前車好了一半的帽冠和帽簷，先套在照著版型做好的紙模上。之前因為大頭針是順著縫線別、而不是垂直別，結果整個車歪，只好拆掉重車。如果想要帽簷稍微再深一點的話，我可能會重新做一次。
#手工製帽

八片帽冠和兩片帽簷已經拼成三大塊，並用別針固定出大致的形狀。這次是用綠色天鵝絨做 Sachi's Studio 的報童帽版型，大部分都是用機器車的。
版型說明有寫要在帽冠的接縫上壓線，感覺可以用同色線或對比色的線。
#手工製帽

把左右兩半帽冠縫合前的俯視圖。正在複習教學影片，我發現 Sachi 在車縫時是用幾個超小強力夾，而不是把整條縫線都別滿大頭針。

報童帽頂端八片接合的地方車得有點亂，看來可能需要個大一點的包釦來遮一下接縫了。

帽冠完全拼好囉，頂端也加上了包布鈕釦。布邊暫時先隨便折進去。接縫還沒整燙也還沒壓線。
#手工製帽

Got trains going every which way.
Got people on all of them.

Now.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_0:
鐘樓
#詩 串聯
一、
羅馬教堂的鐘樓，
金十字架直搗雲霄：
鐘聲敲響，釋放黃銅的音符，
穿透薄霧的籠罩高歌，
那高亢的鐘聲是一聲呼喚，
召喚著早已逝去的信徒。
虔誠的熱忱已不復存在：
無數黎明已化作黃昏。
石塔默默守望，
穿過暮雨的屏障，
天空再次對著屋瓦
傾瀉猛烈的攻勢。
🧵👇🏼
#詩歌 #每日一詩 #憂鬱 #新古典主義 #教堂 #夜晚 #攝影

二、
是誰拉動了鐘繩？
隱修院裡的孤獨修士，
已無同道中人與他相契。
他是教堂這隻牡蠣裡的一粒沙——
然而，沒有哪間修房留有他的床鋪，
沒有哪片塵土曾被他的鞋履拂動，
他的名字從未被提起，
也未曾留下他讀過的舊書。
鐘繩懸掛著，磨損、起毛，
被教堂裡的老鼠牙齒啃咬。
它已經很久沒有搖擺了，
很久沒有被下方的手拉動了。
🧵👇🏼

三、
夜風低語著讚美詩，
呼吸著頌歌的旋律，
搖動著青銅的鐘錘，
我以高音部和唱——
但那並非我自己的聲音。
風吞噬了我的呼喚，
用它狂風暴雨的手，
敲響屬於它自己的神聖聲響。
✋🏼🧵

傾瀉無情風雨。
🧵👇🏼
#詩歌 #每日一詩 #憂鬱 #新古典 #教堂 #夜晚 #攝影

二、
是誰拉動了鐘繩？
修道院裡的孤獨修士，
身旁已無同道之人。
他是教堂這隻牡蠣裡的一粒沙——
然而，沒有哪間僧房放著他的床，
沒有哪片塵土被他的鞋拂動，
他的名字從未被提起，
也沒留下他讀過的舊書。
鐘繩懸掛著，磨損、起毛，
被教堂裡的老鼠啃咬。
它已經很久沒有搖擺，
很久沒有被底下的一雙手拉動了。
🧵👇🏼

三、
夜風低語著聖歌，
吐納著頌歌的旋律，
搖動著青銅鐘錘，
我以高音和唱——
但那並非我自己的聲音。
風吞噬了我的呼喚，
用它暴風雨般的手，
敲響屬於它自己的神聖樂章。
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

source_doc:
They're narcissists.
They think the whole world revolves around them.
Everything is about them.
So if they cut you off, that's because they needed that spot more than you did.
And how dare you question that?
How dare you question that?
They made a move and they're the most important person.
Anyways, yeah, it is what it is, right?

But if you don't say it, and if you stand firm in what you believe in your faith, you're going to lose it all.
And I just remember starting off and, oh, it was like it was just yesterday.
And I remember saying, you know, it's great that Americans, you know, you can choose one or the other.

What do you mean?
The music has stopped?

I hear it.

source_doc:
Aren't you going to say goodbye to me?
How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. hypo_0:
@hacks4pancakes 你覺得實際上到底是怎麼回事？
困惑？焦慮？執行功能障礙？不切實際？還是純粹懶散？
（我心裡並沒有把神經多樣性跟懶惰混為一談，但我好奇這兩者是不是都有可能……）

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD 至少就移居國外這件事來說，我可以想像自己會說「天啊好羨慕喔，我超想去」之類的話，但事實上是因為某些內部或外部因素，導致我不想或無法成行，所以就算有人主動要幫忙打理大小事也改變不了什麼，我還是會婉拒。

@darryl @hacks4pancakes 成熟的婉拒方式應該是說「我之前有點興奮過頭了：雖然我很想去，但因為其他原因沒辦法」，而不是拿時間對不上當藉口敷衍過去！

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

hypo_0:
@rechelon 說「極度不受歡迎」還真是一言難盡……雖然我不住柏林，但我看各地人們的反應也都差不多，就是「去你的這群混蛋，做這種事害這麼多無辜的人沒電可用，還把這當成必要的附帶損害」。我看到很多人在猜這是不是在自導自演，故意要抹黑左翼。不過警察才不在乎，他們現在大概興奮得要命（光想就覺得很噁心），因為終於有藉口可以去臨檢、去把左翼圈子給入罪化了。

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
對啊，我的意思是，現在好像還有大概六個被迷因帳號養大的反文明主義者，很震驚居然沒有人挺他們，更讓他們傻眼的是，那些覺得被這群人冒犯、所以根本不想挺他們的反文明主義老前輩，居然也沒站出來支持他們。

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
我真的很擔心接下來會出現自我合理化的惡性循環，也就是少數幾個反文明主義者因為大家不挺他們對「文明世界」的超屌攻擊而超不爽，結果在被孤立和怒火中燒一兩年後，搞出像 ITS 那種等級的爛事。

我真的很擔心接下來會出現自我合理化的惡性循環，也就是少數幾個反文明份子因為大家不挺他們對「文明世界」的超屌攻擊而氣炸，結果在孤立和憤怒中，一兩年內就搞出像 ITS 那種等級的瘋狂爛事。

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

hypo_0:
@afewbugs 我也遇過這種情況，真的很擔心新成員現在可能在現實生活中找不到這類型的社群，因為他們比較不可能用這種老掉牙的社群媒體了。比方說，之前有人想送出兩輛需要修理的腳踏車，但在 Facebook 上根本沒人理。這要是放在幾年前，不用十分鐘就會有人要了。我自己拿了一輛，很可惜沒辦法把第二輛也帶走。像淨灘/撿垃圾和社區花園這類活動也是類似的情況。

@hicksy2 @afewbugs 我現在在 Facebook Marketplace 上賣東西，比在 Gumtree 上還容易賣出去，而且如果是體積太大沒辦法郵寄的東西，我真的懶得用 eBay。不過這可能也很看你住哪裡，尤其是腳踏車這類東西！

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace 也是讓我離不開 Facebook 的一大原因。以前我還以為是用來跟朋友保持聯絡的，但現在幾乎都看不到現實朋友的貼文了，所以現在主要都是看 Marketplace、在地社團，而且大部分在地店家、甚至連圖書館，好像都只把營業時間和特別活動之類的資訊發在 Facebook 上

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
搬家計畫，春假接力賽
第 1 天：
清空了主臥室的衣櫃
和靠牆一側的箱子內容物。
我正在盤點我所有的家當。挑出一小部分保留。那些有紀念意義的物品，還有重建新生活實用的東西。在這個階段，我知道自己挑出來的東西超出了需要，可能也超出了我能帶走的份量；但我留下的東西顯然更多。盤點完之後，再來決定要保留什麼以及放在哪裡。其餘的所有東西都會留給「拾荒者」處理。
#moverR

第 2 天，週一，中午休息。
今天比昨天更艱難。我挖出了更多「有紀念意義」的東西。挑戰在於：這些保留下來的回憶是種實體負擔，對我的未來沒有任何實際幫助，反而是一種累贅，而且看著它們讓我百感交集。我覺得社會上普遍對保留紀念物抱持強烈的反對態度。但我知道它們的力量很強大。不過，嘿，我是個藝術家。即使是傷感、悲傷的回憶對我來說也很有價值。我依然像之前一樣繼續整理，留下來的東西還是比＋

＋丟掉的少，雖然我知道自己還是留了「太多」。下一個階段才是實際的搬家和儲存階段，到時候可能會刪減更多東西。這個階段是在把清理出來的物品交給別人全部拉走之前的初步篩選。
歸檔：如何搬離住了 12 年的家和生活了 45 年的故鄉，這裡還有著 150 年的家族根源（和文物）。我終於要離開了，去尋找一個符合我價值觀的文化環境。
#moverR
hypo_1:
搬家大作戰，春假接力賽
第 1 天：
清空了主臥室的衣櫃，
還有靠牆那排箱子裡的東西。
我正在盤點我所有的家當。挑出一小部分保留。那些承載回憶的紀念品，還有展開新生活用得到的實用小物。在這個階段，我知道自己留的東西超出了需要，可能也多到我帶不走；但我留下來不要的，數量顯然龐大得多。盤點完之後，再來決定要留下什麼、放去哪裡。其餘的所有東西都會留給「拾荒者」囉。
#moverR

第 2 天，週一，中午休息。
今天比昨天更難熬。我挖出了更多「充滿回憶」的舊物。挑戰在於：這些留存下來的回憶，在現實中是種累贅，對我的未來沒有任何實際幫助，反而成了負擔，但看著它們，我卻覺得自己完整了。我感覺大家好像都很反對留著這些紀念物。但我知道它們的力量很強大。不過，嘿，我可是個藝術家。即使是傷感、悲傷的回憶對我來說也很有價值。我依然像之前一樣繼續整理，留下來的東西還是比＋

＋丟掉的少，雖然我知道自己還是留了「太多」。下一個階段才是實際的搬家和寄倉，到時候可能還會再刪減。這個階段是在把清理出來的物品交給別人全部拉走之前的初步篩選。
分類標籤：如何搬離住了 12 年的家和生活了 45 年的家鄉，這裡還有著 150 年的家族根源（和老物件）。我終於要離開了，去尋找一個懂我價值觀的文化環境。
#moverR

```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```

```json
  "直接在 Mambalo 控制面板中設定與管理 Facebook 商店。告別社群分享，您已準備好迎接社群銷售。",
  "只需點擊幾下，即可直接在 Mambalo 控制面板中輕鬆新增、推廣和銷售產品，或管理您所有的 Facebook 廣告。",
  "透過 Facebook 再行銷，將過路訪客轉化為付費客戶。只需點擊幾下，我們就能建立高度精準的廣告，向您的客戶提醒他們考慮過但未購買的產品。",
  "隨處銷售",

  "Facebook 商店廣告投放——變得無比簡單",
```

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.

hypo_0:
在法庭之外，那些幫凶簡直像沒完沒了一樣，瘋狂肉搜、騷擾、威脅我，還有任何他們覺得有以任何形式「幫」過我的人。
其中一個幫凶是 TikTok 網紅 Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim，她直接跑來蹭我前任的公開貼文，而且私底下認識我前任。
我會重新發一些他們針對我的影片，並加上警語。
但我只想讓大家看清楚，這些人有多想抹殺我和我少數的成就。
以下是針對我案子中一名證人的暴力威脅。

這個抖音網紅把肉搜我、我朋友，特別是我非法驅逐案的證人，當作他們最主要的創作內容。
在他們拍的關於我的影片裡，他們試圖把我描繪成「不是活動家」、「不是駭客」，而「只是個騙子」。
這一切都只是因為我前任覺得在處理分手的過程中分攤帳單算是一種家庭暴力。
然後，他們把這群在網路上一直追著我咬的網路暴民稱為「社會運動」，還利用我的痛苦和訴訟過程來募款。
#黑人育兒艱辛

Areej "solidarityluvr" 在當地很有名，因為她常在自己的 TikTok 和 IG 上發影片，記錄自己跟蹤和騷擾好幾個前任的過程。
Areej 甚至在鏡頭前，用防狼噴霧攻擊了一位剛下班的跨性別圖書館員 Canyon，可能只是因為 Canyon 必須執行基本的圖書館規定。
之後 Areej 還對 Canyon 進行了長達數月的網路霸凌。
不久後，Canyon 就因疑似蓄意服用藥物過量而過世。
社區裡的許多人都認為 Areej 的行為直接導致了 Canyon 的死亡。
這就是我前任交的「好朋友」。

反正呢……這種左派內鬥，簡直是史上最爛、充滿波特蘭奇特風格的鄉土劇。
在這之前，我從來沒有在公開場合發過任何關於 Areej 的事。
兩年前 Areej 確實聯絡過我，想把我扯進一些內鬥裡，但我立刻拒絕參與了。
我私下和社區針對他們提出的問題討論了幾次，以確保修復式正義程序已經或將要進行。
因為當時程序已經在進行，而且有足夠的支持，所以我選擇退出。
這就是我們之間僅有的接觸了。

在我退出的時候，我有警告過社區不要進行網路霸凌，尤其是針對原本人際衝突以外的第三方。
這個警告是針對 Areej 的，我覺得在大家都已經做出對他們有利的決定之上，她還進行網路霸凌，真的很沒格調。
我特別覺得 Areej 在過程中肉搜修復式正義委員會/調解人的行為，完全就是一種虐待。
我當時還特別警告過，這很可能會造成 Areej 的受害者面臨自我傷害的真實風險。

我特別覺得 Areej 在程序進行期間，肉搜修復式正義委員會/調解人的行為，完全就是一種虐待。
我當時還特別警告過，這很可能會造成 Areej 的受害者面臨自我傷害的真實風險。
hypo_4:
在法庭之外，一堆爪牙簡直像沒完沒了一樣，瘋狂肉搜、騷擾、威脅我，還有任何他們覺得有以任何形式「幫」過我的人。
其中一個爪牙是 TikTok 網紅 Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim，她直接跑來蹭我前任的公開貼文，而且私底下認識我前任。
我會重新發一些他們針對我的影片，並加上內容警示。
但我只想讓大家看清楚，這些人有多想抹殺我和我少數的成就。
以下是針對我案子中一名證人的暴力威脅。

這個抖音網紅把肉搜我、我朋友，特別是我非法驅逐案的證人，當作他們最主要的創作內容。
在他們拍的關於我的影片裡，他們試圖把我抹黑成「不是活動家」、「不是駭客」，而「只是個騙子」。
這一切都只是因為我前任覺得在處理分手的過程中分攤帳單算是一種家庭暴力。

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
@la 機加工的第一條守則不就是「如果還沒銑面，它就既不直也不平」嗎？

@azonenberg 沒錯，當然是這樣，但我*本來*確實是要銑面的。我只是刀具對零設錯了。
因為我以為它大概是平的。
我今天在多做一個零件。材料還夠。如果不做的話，我心裡會一直疙瘩。再加上在測試軸承配合時，我不小心把固定零件在板上的膠弄斷了，所以不管怎樣我都得重新對位，但我真的不想這樣做啊啊啊，所以……

@la 我懂這種感覺。
之前在整修房子的時候也遇過類似的問題，簡直所有你能想到的基準面全都是歪的。
我請承包商把一個門框裝得垂直又方正。結果他走之後，我不得不拆掉幾根立柱，因為那個門必須要傾斜個一度左右，才能跟地板貼平，不然某一邊就會懸空。
另外一面（半高）牆的每根立柱都要仔細裁切到特定長度，因為沒有兩根尺寸是一樣的……地板不平，所以為了讓檯面保持水平，牆面得做成平行四邊形，而不是矩形
hypo_1:
@la 機加工的第一條守則不就是「如果還沒銑面，它就既不直也不平」嗎？

@azonenberg 沒錯，當然是這樣，但我*本來*確實是要銑面的。我只是對刀設錯了。
因為我以為它大概是平的。

```json
{
  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",
  "advertise.page_title": "Advertise on {{website_name}}",
  "advertise.why_advertise.title": "Why Advertise on with us?",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Here are just a few reasons:",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_2": "With ~100,000 new members joining us every month, you'll reach new customers daily.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "You'll have access to a dashboard so you know how your ads are doing 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Ads run from the 1st to the last day of the month",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Renew by the 15th of the month to guarantee your slots for the next month.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "Ad Image Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "Aspect ratio:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "Display size:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "Ad Text Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "# of lines:",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Don't have an ad? We can help you with that. All you have to do is just get into {{link_tag_start}}contact with us{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Sample Ads",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Setting yourself up for success.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "You will get the most out of the app by respecting people’s boundaries.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Find Your Local Scene"
}
```

```json
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "一個版位每月 500 美元起。如果您想在一個月內投放多個版位，每個額外版位每月 400 美元起。",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "請在當月 15 日前續約，以確保您下個月的版位。",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "如果您有任何疑問或想在我們的網站上刊登廣告，請發送電子郵件至：",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "廣告圖片規格",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "寬高比：",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "顯示尺寸：",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "廣告文字規格",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "行數：",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "還沒有廣告？我們可以協助您。您只需與我們{{link_tag_start}}取得聯繫{{link_tag_end}}即可。",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "廣告範例",

  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "歡迎回家",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "為您的成功做好準備。",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "按照您自己的步調前進",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "尊重他人的界線，能讓您在 App 中獲得最佳體驗。",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "對您覺得有吸引力和有趣的事物表達喜愛。您表達的喜愛越多，我們就越能推薦您會喜歡的內容。",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "尋找您的在地圈子"
}
```

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n

hypo_0:
今天早上走路去上班的時候，我腦中閃過一個念頭：大家之所以會覺得 #replyGuy （愛插嘴的怪人）問題在 #Mastodon （以及整個 #Fediverse 聯邦宇宙）上更嚴重，有沒有可能單純是因為人數（不夠）的關係？
所以我列出了一個簡化模型，想看看這是不是真的足以解釋這個現象。
我們假設，就像卡洛·奇波拉的《人類愚蠢基本定律》一樣，在任何群體中，愛插嘴怪人的比例都是一個固定的常數 ρ。
1/n
#maths

為了簡化，我們也假設這些愛插嘴怪人都是手動操作，也就是說，他們不會用什麼自動化工具去搜尋貼文來回覆。這樣一來，一個愛插嘴怪人在一天內能回覆的貼文總數就會有一個上限，我們把它叫做 D。
我們也可以假設，平均來說，一個正常用戶每天發的貼文數是 P，且 P < D。
我們先不看比一天更長的時間跨度（但如果拉長時間來看，討論的結果也差不多）…
2/n

…並假設愛插嘴怪人是隨機挑選貼文來回覆的（也就是說，他們不會因為特定原因特別針對某個人），那我們能不能算出，特定某個人會收到至少一個愛插嘴怪人回覆的機率是多少？
在實際計算之前，我們先來看一些實際的例子。假設每 10 個用戶裡就有 1 個是愛插嘴怪人，一個愛插嘴怪人一天會看 100 篇貼文，而一個正常用戶一天會發 10 篇貼文。
3/n

如果網路上只有 10 個用戶，那就有 9 個正常用戶和 1 個愛插嘴怪人。每天會有 90 篇正常貼文，而那唯一的愛插嘴怪人會看到「所有」貼文（因為他一天可以看 100 篇貼文，所以他看得完網路上那天發的所有貼文）。
然而，如果網路上有 100 個用戶，其中 10 個是愛插嘴怪人，那麼網路上每天會產生 900 篇貼文，但愛插嘴怪人就「不一定」看得完所有的貼文了！
4/n

在第二種情況下，每個愛插嘴怪人只會從 900 篇貼文中隨機看到 100 篇。雖然有 10 個愛插嘴怪人，但這並不代表每篇貼文都會被愛插嘴怪人看到！有些貼文可能會被好幾個愛插嘴怪人看到，而有些貼文則可能完全沒被任何一個愛插嘴怪人看到！
那麼，在這種情況下，我們要怎麼計算一篇貼文被愛插嘴怪人看到的機率呢？
其中一個方法，是先算出「完全沒被任何」愛插嘴怪人看到的機率，然後再用 1 去減。
5/n

好，因為每個愛插嘴怪人會在 900 篇貼文裡看到 100 篇，所以每篇貼文被某個特定的愛插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1/9，也就是說，有 8/9 的機率「不會」被那個特定的愛插嘴怪人看到。因此，假設這些機率是互相獨立的，那「完全沒被任何一個」愛插嘴怪人看到的機率，對每個愛插嘴怪人來說就是 8/9，這意味著沒被這 10 個愛插嘴怪人看到的機率是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794...。
6/n

這代表每篇貼文被「至少一個」愛插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1-(8/9)^10，大約是 69%。
當然，如果有人一天發 10 篇貼文，那他們遇到愛插嘴怪人的機率就會比這更高，因為那會是他們「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個愛插嘴怪人」看到的機率！
同樣假設每篇貼文的機率都是獨立的，計算方式只會稍微複雜一點點：
6/n

每篇貼文有 (8/9)^10 的機率不被看到，但如果要算「所有」貼文都沒被看到的機率，就必須把這個機率再乘方到同一個人發的貼文總數，也就是 10，得到 (8/9)^100。這樣一來，「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個」愛插嘴怪人看到的機率就變成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233…，這雖然不是 100%，但也非常接近了。
這是 100 個人（其中 10 個是愛插嘴怪人）的情況。我們再看一個例子，然後再來推導一般規律。
7/n

現在假設這個網路有 10 萬名用戶，愛插嘴怪人的比例依然是 10%（9 萬名正常用戶，1 萬名愛插嘴怪人）。
每個愛插嘴怪人每天還是讀 100 篇貼文，正常用戶每天也還是發 10 篇貼文。
這代表在一天之內，正常用戶會產生 90 萬篇貼文，而每個愛插嘴怪人會讀這 90 萬篇貼文中的 100 篇！
在同樣是隨機閱讀的假設下，這代表一個愛插嘴怪人只會看到 100/90萬 比例的貼文！
8/n

當然，如果有人一天發 10 篇貼文，那他們遇到愛插嘴怪人的機率就會比這更高，因為那會是他們「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個愛插嘴怪人」看到的機率！
同樣假設每篇貼文的機率都是獨立的，計算方式只會稍微複雜一點點：
6/n

每篇貼文有 (8/9)^10 的機率不被看到，但如果要算「所有」貼文都沒被看到的機率，就必須把這個機率再乘方到同一個人發的貼文總數，也就是 10，得到 (8/9)^100。這樣一來，「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個」愛插嘴怪人看到的機率就變成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233…，這雖然不是 100%，但也非常接近了。
這是 100 個人（其中 10 個是愛插嘴怪人）的情況。我們再看一個例子，然後再來推導一般規律。
7/n

現在假設這個網路有 10 萬名用戶，愛插嘴怪人的比例依然是 10%（9 萬名正常用戶，1 萬名愛插嘴怪人）。
每個愛插嘴怪人每天還是讀 100 篇貼文，正常用戶每天也還是發 10 篇貼文。
這代表在一天之內，正常用戶會產生 90 萬篇貼文，而每個愛插嘴怪人會讀這 90 萬篇貼文中的 100 篇！
在同樣是隨機閱讀的假設下，這代表一個愛插嘴怪人只會看到 100/90萬 比例的貼文！
8/n
hypo_3:
今天早上走路去上班的時候，我突然想到一件事：大家覺得 #replyGuy （不請自來的說教愛好者）問題在 #Mastodon （以及整個聯邦宇宙 #Fediverse）上好像比較嚴重，有沒有可能單純是因為（缺乏）人數的關係？
所以我列出了一個簡化模型，想看看這是否真的足以解釋這個現象。
我們假設，就像卡洛·奇波拉的《人類愚蠢基本定律》一樣，在任何群體中，這種不請自來愛插嘴的人比例都是一個固定的常數 ρ。
1/n
#maths

為了簡化，我們也假設這些插嘴怪人都是手動操作，也就是說，他們不會用什麼自動化工具去搜貼文來回覆。這限制了他們一天之內能回覆的貼文總數上限，我們把它叫做 D。
我們也可以假設，平均來說，一個正常用戶每天發的貼文數是 P，且 P < D。
我們先忽略比一天更長的時間跨度（但如果拉長觀察期，討論的結果也差不多）…
2/n

…並假設這些插嘴怪人是隨機挑選貼文來回覆的（也就是說，他們不會因為特定原因特別針對某個人），那我們能不能算出，特定某個人會收到至少一個插嘴怪人回覆的機率是多少？
在實際計算之前，我們先來看一些實際的例子。假設每 10 個用戶裡就有 1 個是這種插嘴怪人，一個插嘴怪人一天會看 100 篇貼文，而一個正常用戶一天會發 10 篇貼文。
3/n

如果網路上只有 10 個用戶，那就有 9 個正常用戶和 1 個插嘴怪人。每天會有 90 篇正常貼文，而那唯一的插嘴怪人會看到「所有」貼文（因為他一天可以看 100 篇貼文，所以他看得完網路上那天發的所有貼文）。
然而，如果網路上有 100 個用戶，其中 10 個是插嘴怪人，那麼網路上每天會產生 900 篇貼文，但插嘴怪人就「不一定」看得完所有的貼文了！
4/n

在第二種情況下，每個插嘴怪人會從 900 篇貼文中隨機看到 100 篇。雖然有 10 個插嘴怪人，但這並不代表每篇貼文都會被他們找到！有些貼文可能會被好幾個插嘴怪人看到，而有些貼文則可能完全沒被任何一個插嘴怪人看到！
那麼，在這種情況下，我們要怎麼計算一篇貼文被插嘴怪人看到的機率呢？
其中一個方法，是先算出「完全沒被任何一個」插嘴怪人看到的機率，然後再取其餘角（用 1 去減）。
5/n

好，因為每個插嘴怪人會在 900 篇貼文裡看到 100 篇，所以每篇貼文被某個特定的插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1/9，也就是說，有 8/9 的機率「不會」被那個特定的插嘴怪人看到。因此，假設這些機率是互相獨立的，那沒被這 10 個插嘴怪人看到的機率就是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794...。
6/n

這代表每篇貼文被「至少一個」插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1-(8/9)^10，大約是 69%。
當然，如果有人一天發 10 篇貼文，那他們遇到插嘴怪人的機率就會比這更高，因為這會是他們「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個插嘴怪人」看到的機率！
同樣假設每篇貼文的機率都是獨立的，數學計算只會稍微複雜一點點：
6/n

每篇貼文有 (8/9)^10 的機率不被看到，但如果要算「所有」貼文都沒被看到的機率，就必須把這個機率再乘方到同一個人發的貼文總數，也就是 10，得到 (8/9)^100。這樣一來，「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個」插嘴怪人看到的機率就變成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233…，這雖然不是 100%，但也非常接近了。
這是 100 個人（其中 10 個是插嘴怪人）的情況。我們再看一個例子，然後再來推導一般規律。
7/n

現在假設這個網路有 10 萬名用戶，插嘴怪人的比例依然是 10%（9 萬名正常用戶，1 萬名插嘴怪人）。

在同樣是隨機閱讀的假設下，這代表一個插嘴怪人只會看到 100/90萬 的貼文！

好，因為每個插嘴怪人會在 900 篇貼文裡看到 100 篇，所以每篇貼文被某個特定的插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1/9，也就是說，有 8/9 的機率「不會」被那個特定的插嘴怪人看到。因此，假設這些機率是互相獨立的，那沒被這 10 個插嘴怪人看到的機率就是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794...。
6/n

這代表每篇貼文被「至少一個」插嘴怪人看到的機率是 1-(8/9)^10，大約是 69%。
當然，如果有人一天發 10 篇貼文，那他們遇到插嘴怪人的機率就會比這更高，因為這會是他們「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個插嘴怪人」看到的機率！
同樣假設每篇貼文的機率都是獨立的，數學計算只會稍微複雜一點點：
6/n

每篇貼文有 (8/9)^10 的機率不被看到，但如果要算「所有」貼文都沒被看到的機率，就必須把這個機率再乘方到同一個人發的貼文總數，也就是 10，得到 (8/9)^100。這樣一來，「至少有一篇貼文」被「至少一個」插嘴怪人看到的機率就變成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233…，這雖然不是 100%，但也非常接近了。
這是 100 個人（其中 10 個是插嘴怪人）的情況。我們再看一個例子，然後再來推導一般規律。
7/n

現在假設這個網路有 10 萬名用戶，插嘴怪人的比例依然是 10%（9 萬名正常用戶，1 萬名插嘴怪人）。
每個插嘴怪人每天還是讀 100 篇貼文，正常用戶每天也還是發 10 篇貼文。
這代表在一天之內，正常用戶會產生 90 萬篇貼文，而每個插嘴怪人會讀這 90 萬篇貼文中的 100 篇！
在同樣是隨機閱讀的假設下，這代表一個插嘴怪人只會看到 100/90萬 的貼文！
8/n
hypo_7:
今天早上走路去上班的時候，我突然想到一件事：大家覺得 #replyGuy （不請自來的說教愛好者）問題在 #Mastodon （以及整個聯邦宇宙 #Fediverse）上好像比較嚴重，有沒有可能單純是因為（缺乏）人數的關係？
所以我列出了一個簡化模型，想看看這是否真的足以解釋這個現象。
我們假設，就像卡洛·奇波拉的《人類愚蠢基本定律》一樣，在任何群體中，這種不請自來愛插嘴的人比例都是一個固定的常數 ρ。
1/n
#maths

為了簡化，我們也假設這些插嘴怪人都是手動操作，也就是說，他們不會用什麼自動化工具去搜貼文來回覆。這限制了他們一天之內能回覆的貼文總數上限，我們把它叫做 D。
我們也可以假設，平均來說，一個正常用戶每天發的貼文數是 P，且 P < D。
我們先忽略比一天更長的時間跨度（但如果拉長觀察期，討論的結果也差不多）…
2/n

…並假設這些插嘴怪人是隨機挑選貼文來回覆的（也就是說，他們不會因為特定原因特別針對某個人），那我們能不能算出，特定某個人會收到至少一個插嘴怪人回覆的機率是多少？

如果網路上只有 10 個用戶，那就有 9 個正常用戶和 1 個插嘴怪人。每天會有 90 篇正常貼文，而那唯一的插嘴怪人會看到「所有」貼文（因為他一天可以看 100 篇貼文，所以他看得完網路上那天發的所有貼文）。

那麼，在這種情況下，我們要怎麼計算一篇貼文被插嘴怪人看到的機率呢？

@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

@theynege 他截圖了她的帳號，然後發文酸她是「瘋狂口罩女」，被大家指責之後，他「立刻」刪掉貼文，然後開始狂發自己身為「社群建立者」的豐功偉業，還有所有跟他合作過的人等等等，哇，他好棒棒喔。完全不承認自己——一個自稱社群建立者、兼具邊緣化群體身分什麼的傢伙——這樣做根本是在網路上針對一個有身心障礙的少數族裔女性進行霸凌。

@theynege 他截圖了她的帳號，發文酸她是「瘋狂口罩女」，被大家指責後，他「立刻」刪掉貼文，開始狂發自己身為「社群建立者」的資歷，還有所有跟他合作過的人等等等，哇，他好棒棒喔。完全不承認自己——一個自稱社群建立者、還有一堆邊緣化群體身分的傢伙——這樣做根本是在網路上針對一個有身障的少數族裔女性進行騷擾。
那種精準狙擊的手段真的讓人看傻眼。他早就準備好要跟所有人吹噓自己有多偉大，好掩蓋那場他明知會帶來傷害的惡意攻擊。

@quietmarc @theynege 那篇貼文簡直是歧視身障的帽子戲法

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Traditional Taiwan grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Chinese, Traditional Taiwan translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Traditional Taiwan (zho_Hant_TW):
hypo_0:
在烏斯曼·卡瓦加（Usman Khawaja）帶領布里斯本熱浪（Brisbane Heat）於主場迎戰雪梨雷霆（Sydney Thunder）之後，墨爾本叛國者（Melbourne Renegades）將在漫威體育場（Marvel Stadium）迎戰葛倫·麥斯威爾（Glenn Maxwell）率領的墨爾本之星（Melbourne Stars），展開BBL15的對決。

山姆·哈波（Sam Harper）表現神勇，以51球轟出82分不分出局，而葛倫·麥斯威爾則在低調的局數中找回擊球手感，以17球拿下20分不分出局，其中包括一記巨大的六分打。他並未失去實力，且顯然相當享受這次在場上實戰的機會。

現場 42,846 名觀眾未能如願看到一場勢均力敵的較量，墨爾本之星在還剩 25 球的情況下，以 8 個球門（wickets）的優勢輕鬆贏得比賽。

這場勝利讓墨爾本之星中止了三連敗，保住了晉級希望，同時也讓墨爾本叛國者的晉級之路變得艱難。馬庫斯·史托尼斯（Marcus Stoinis）投球表現出色，拿下 3 局 33 分，甚至一度有機會挑戰「帽子戲法」；而哈波則維持極佳狀態，本屆賽事至今已累計擊出 356 分，打擊率（strike rate）達 159%，他也因此榮膺單場最佳球員。

湯姆·羅傑斯（Tom Rogers）迅速反彈，在對抗墨爾本叛國者時快速拿下 50 分

不過，自從湯姆·羅傑斯在開局時以 19 球攻下 50 分，並與哈波攜手奠定 84 分的開局合作夥伴關係後，大局便已定。

哈波接受福斯板球（Fox Cricket）採訪時表示：「他們之前在墨爾本板球場（MCG）擊敗了我們，所以能拿下第五場勝利感覺很好。」

最耐人尋味的是福斯板球評論席上的發言。前英格蘭隊隊長麥克·沃恩（Michael Vaughan）明確表達了他對英格蘭決策層處理哈利·布魯克（Harry Brook）在紐西蘭夜店事件方式的失望。該事件發生在他們抵達澳洲參加「骨灰盃」（The Ashes）之前。

墨爾本之星的老將彼得·希德爾（Peter Siddle）表示「這是一個很好的扭轉」，這場勝利讓球隊重新升至 BBL 積分榜的第二位。

隨著墨爾本叛國者還剩三場比賽，墨爾本之星還剩兩場，競爭正開始白熱化。

這個夏天還有許多精彩的板球賽事，請繼續鎖定。感謝您的關注。墨爾本之星最終能奪得冠軍嗎？

最引人注目的是福斯板球評論席上的發言。前英格蘭隊隊長麥克·沃恩（Michael Vaughan）明確表達了他對英格蘭高層處理哈利·布魯克（Harry Brook）在紐西蘭夜店事件方式的失望。該事件發生在他們抵達澳洲參加「骨灰盃」（The Ashes）之前。

墨爾本之星的老將彼得·希德爾（Peter Siddle）表示「這是一個很好的扭轉」，這場勝利讓球隊重新升至 BBL 積分榜的第二位。

隨著墨爾本叛逆者還剩三場比賽，墨爾本之星還剩兩場，競爭正開始白熱化。

hypo_5:
在烏斯曼·卡瓦加（Usman Khawaja）帶領布里斯本熱浪（Brisbane Heat）於主場迎戰雪梨雷霆（Sydney Thunder）之後，墨爾本叛逆者（Melbourne Renegades）將在漫威體育場（Marvel Stadium）迎戰葛倫·麥斯威爾（Glenn Maxwell）領軍的墨爾本之星（Melbourne Stars），展開 BBL15 的對決。

山姆·哈波（Sam Harper）表現神勇，以 51 球轟出 82 分未出局主宰全場；葛倫·麥斯威爾則在節奏較緩的局數中找回擊球手感，以 17 球拿下 20 分未出局，其中包括一記驚人的六分打。他寶刀未老，顯然相當享受這次在場上實戰的機會。

現場 42,846 名觀眾未能如願看到一場勢均力敵的激戰，墨爾本之星在還剩 25 球的情況下，便以 8 個殘局（wickets）的優勢輕鬆勝出。

這場勝利讓墨爾本之星中止了三連敗，保住了晉級希望，同時也讓墨爾本叛逆者的處境更加艱難。馬庫斯·史托尼斯（Marcus Stoinis）投球表現出色，奪下 3 個三振僅失 33 分，甚至一度有機會挑戰「帽子戲法」；而哈波則維持極佳狀態，本屆賽事至今已累計擊出 356 分，打擊率（strike rate）高達 159%，他也毫無懸念地榮膺單場最佳球員。
